title: Japanese Lamb Tagine
description: A twist on traditional Italian cuisine, this Japanese-inspired lamb tagine is a unique and flavorful dish.

ingredients.name: Lamb leg
ingredients.amount: 1 (1.5-2 pound) boneless leg of lamb, cut into 2-inch pieces

ingredients.name: Craving ginger
ingredients.amount: 2 inches fresh ginger, peeled and grated

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from pot and set aside.
Add ginger and cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add sake, tagine spice blend, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Return lamb to pot and bring to a simmer.
Cover pot and transfer to the oven. Braise until lamb is tender, about 2 1/2 hours.
Stir in raisins and parsley. Serve lamb hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
Serve over couscous or rice, if desired.
